name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 17 Oct 2023
body: [{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Great news, Maropostians!!! We are delighted to announce the highly awaited revamp of our Landing page feature. Now you can create vivid and amazing standalone pages for your users."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To know more, continue reading ahead!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT – Revamped Landing Pages UIs:","bold":true}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"An Informative Index Page","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Landing Pages now have a much more detailed layout, wherein you can view key details of a page from a single place. Plus, you can now sort and view web pages as per "},{"text":"WYSIWYG","bold":true},{"text":" or "},{"text":"Drag & Drop","bold":true},{"text":" format. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/land45.0685g00000I4dD6AAJ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/land45.0685g00000I4dD6AAJ.png","name":"land45","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1088,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Introduction-to-Landing-Pages","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Introduction to Landing Pages","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"Simplistic Designing Process","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"New to landing pages? Not to worry, we provide a straightforward design process. Simply click on new page >> Start Designing >> Choose your format >> Fill out basic details>> And begin with your web page design."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/land46.0685g00000I4cipAAB.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/land46.0685g00000I4cipAAB.png","name":"land46","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1317,"width":2880}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"See "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Creating-Landing-Pages","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Creating Landing Pages","bold":true}]},{"text":" to learn the steps in detail."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"An array of Customization Tools","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Whether it be "},{"text":"WYSIWYG","bold":true},{"text":" or "},{"text":"Drag & Drop","bold":true},{"text":" format, you’ll have a number of design tools at your disposal."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Below is what a WYSIWYG editor page looks like. Another advantage of this format is that you can copy and paste your own HTML code into this editor. This takes personalization to a whole new
